profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Sumber Sinergi Makmur Tbk provides security and productivity solutions. It offers real-time tracking to monitor vehicle positions; turn off the vehicle engine; In-cab sound monitor; and 4G connectivity solutions. GPS tracker for excavator, bulldozer, forklift, sport, sedan, SUV, MPV, touring, skuter, Matic, wallet, bag, and suitcases. The company was founded in 2015 and is headquartered in Jakarta Pusat, Indonesia.
